title: AIIMS Bhubaneshwar Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 83 Senior Resident Posts
description: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhubaneswar (AIIMS Bhubaneswar) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancy of 83 Senior Resident Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MD/MS and DNB can apply for the AIIMS Bhubaneshwar Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit,...
